reusable_ips.name: AES Cryptographic Accelerator
reusable_ips.description: Hardware AES-128/256 encryption/decryption accelerator with DMA interface.
reusable_ips.role: Provides high-speed cryptographic acceleration for secure communications, authentication, and data protection.

reusable_ips.name: Analog Multiplexer
reusable_ips.description: High-speed analog switch matrix for channel selection.
reusable_ips.role: Routes multiple analog signals to a single converter or processing path.

reusable_ips.name: Bandgap Reference
reusable_ips.description: Master 1.2 V reference for mixed-signal chips.
reusable_ips.role: Provides a stable reference for regulators, comparators, and analog bias paths.

reusable_ips.name: Battery Cell Monitor and Balancer
reusable_ips.description: Single or multi-cell battery voltage and temperature monitor with integrated cell balancing switches.
reusable_ips.role: Monitors battery health, enforces safe charge/discharge limits, and balances multi-cell packs for longevity.

reusable_ips.name: Bias Generator
reusable_ips.description: Self-biasing circuit with programmable trim for distributed bias.
reusable_ips.role: Generates precision bias currents for analog blocks without external reference.

reusable_ips.name: Bluetooth Low Energy Transceiver
reusable_ips.description: Integrated BLE 5.0+ radio transceiver with on-chip antenna interface and SPI control.
reusable_ips.role: Provides wireless connectivity for IoT edge nodes and sensor aggregation in industrial and consumer applications.

reusable_ips.name: Battery Management System Controller
reusable_ips.description: Advanced battery management system controller with multi-cell monitoring, pack balancing, and load switching.
reusable_ips.role: Manages overall battery pack safety, lifespan, and performance through intelligent charging, discharging, and fault detection.

reusable_ips.name: Boost Converter
reusable_ips.description: Boost regulator for generating higher voltage rails from lower supply.
reusable_ips.role: Steps up lower input voltage to higher output voltage for high-side drivers and special bias networks.

reusable_ips.name: Buck Converter
reusable_ips.description: Switching regulator reference for PMIC and power-management chip assembly.
reusable_ips.role: Generates efficient lower-voltage rails from higher-voltage sources.

reusable_ips.name: Buffered Precision DAC
reusable_ips.description: High-resolution DAC with integrated output buffer for low-impedance analog signal generation.
reusable_ips.role: Converts digital control words into precise, low-impedance analog voltages for accurate setpoint control.

reusable_ips.name: CAN Controller
reusable_ips.description: CAN protocol engine for automotive messaging.
reusable_ips.role: Implements CAN 2.0A/B protocol state machine and frame handling.

reusable_ips.name: CAN Transceiver
reusable_ips.description: CAN bus physical layer interface for automotive networking.
reusable_ips.role: Bridges digital CAN protocol signals to automotive CAN bus.

reusable_ips.name: CANopen Protocol Controller
reusable_ips.description: Full-stack CANopen protocol implementation with SDO, PDO, and NMT state machine.
reusable_ips.role: Implements CANopen protocol for industrial machinery, robotics, and distributed control systems.

reusable_ips.name: Charge Pump
reusable_ips.description: Switched-capacitor voltage converter for high-voltage generation.
reusable_ips.role: Creates higher-voltage rails or negative voltages from single-supply sources.

reusable_ips.name: Clock Divider
reusable_ips.description: Programmable clock frequency divider for multi-rate systems.
reusable_ips.role: Generates slower clock domains for power-efficient processing.

reusable_ips.name: Multiplexed Comparator Array
reusable_ips.description: Array of analog comparators with multiplexed input and programmable thresholds.
reusable_ips.role: Enables multi-threshold analog monitoring with a single comparator array macro.

reusable_ips.name: CMOS Comparator
reusable_ips.description: Reusable comparator for converter and monitor macros.
reusable_ips.role: Compares analog levels for thresholding and bit decisions.

reusable_ips.name: Control Logic
reusable_ips.description: Chip-level sequencing and enable orchestration logic.
reusable_ips.role: Coordinates power-up order, mode transitions, and safety gating.

reusable_ips.name: Current Mirror
reusable_ips.description: Precision current steering circuit for analog bias and reference generation.
reusable_ips.role: Duplicates reference currents for distributed bias across analog blocks.

reusable_ips.name: Current Reference Generator
reusable_ips.description: Temperature-compensated current reference generator based on bandgap principle.
reusable_ips.role: Provides precision reference current for distributed analog bias without external components.

reusable_ips.name: R-2R DAC 4-bit
reusable_ips.description: Reusable DAC building block for converter and mixed-signal control designs.
reusable_ips.role: Converts digital control words into analog voltage levels.

reusable_ips.name: Differential Amplifier
reusable_ips.description: Precision differential amplifier with high CMRR for balanced signal conditioning and low-noise amplification.
reusable_ips.role: Provides differential gain for instrumentation, precision measurements, and audio front-end applications.

reusable_ips.name: ESD Protection Diode Array
reusable_ips.description: On-chip ESD clamps and protection diodes for all I/O pins.
reusable_ips.role: Protects core circuitry from ESD transients during assembly, test, and use.

reusable_ips.name: Ethernet PHY (10/100 Base-T)
reusable_ips.description: 10Base-T/100Base-TX Ethernet transceiver PHY with integrated analog front-end and digital control.
reusable_ips.role: Provides Ethernet connectivity for networked IoT, industrial, and automotive applications.

reusable_ips.name: Flash Memory Compiler
reusable_ips.description: Non-volatile flash memory for firmware storage and calibration data.
reusable_ips.role: Stores bootcode, calibration constants, and configuration across power cycles.

reusable_ips.name: Frequency Detector/Monitor
reusable_ips.description: Clock frequency detector and monitoring circuit for oscillator health checking.
reusable_ips.role: Validates oscillator frequency within expected range to prevent runaway clock faults.

reusable_ips.name: GPIO Controller
reusable_ips.description: General-purpose I/O interface with configurable direction, pull-ups, and interrupt support.
reusable_ips.role: Provides flexible digital I/O for auxiliary control, status monitoring, and application-specific signals.

reusable_ips.name: High-Speed Comparator
reusable_ips.description: Ultra-fast comparator for high-frequency signal detection and threshold crossing in RF and mixed-signal applications.
reusable_ips.role: Provides sub-nanosecond propagation delay for precision timing and high-speed ADC feedback paths.

reusable_ips.name: I2C Controller
reusable_ips.description: I2C master/slave interface for sensor and peripheral communication.
reusable_ips.role: Provides inter-chip communication for multi-device sensor platforms.

reusable_ips.name: I2S Audio Controller
reusable_ips.description: I2S/PCM digital audio interface for audio codecs and digital audio processing.
reusable_ips.role: Handles I2S protocol timing and data synchronization for audio streaming.

reusable_ips.name: I3C (Improved I2C) Controller
reusable_ips.description: MIPI I3C interface controller supporting both legacy I2C and high-speed DDR modes (up to 12.5 Mbps).
reusable_ips.role: Provides backward-compatible sensor interface with higher bandwidth and lower latency for IoT sensor hubs.

reusable_ips.name: Inertial Measurement Unit Interface
reusable_ips.description: I2C interface controller for 3-axis accelerometer/gyroscope sensing with integrated interrupt processing.
reusable_ips.role: Integrates MEMS inertial sensors for motion detection, gesture recognition, and kinematic monitoring in mobile and IoT.

reusable_ips.name: Interrupt Controller
reusable_ips.description: Prioritized interrupt dispatcher for multi-source event handling.
reusable_ips.role: Arbitrates and prioritizes multiple interrupt sources to CPU.

reusable_ips.name: Isolated Gate Driver
reusable_ips.description: Galvanically isolated MOSFET/IGBT gate driver for three-phase power conversion and switching.
reusable_ips.role: Provides high-side drive for power electronics while maintaining galvanic isolation to prevent ground loops.

reusable_ips.name: Analog LDO
reusable_ips.description: Regulated analog rail generator for sensor, reference, and interface domains.
reusable_ips.role: Creates a quiet analog rail from a higher-voltage source.

reusable_ips.name: Digital LDO
reusable_ips.description: Low-noise regulator for digital core and control logic domains.
reusable_ips.role: Generates the digital core supply from the parent analog rail.

reusable_ips.name: LIN Rail LDO
reusable_ips.description: Automotive-facing regulator for LIN bus driver domains.
reusable_ips.role: Creates the LIN transceiver supply from VBAT or another HV source.

reusable_ips.name: LIN Controller
reusable_ips.description: Protocol state machine for LIN framing, timing, and control.
reusable_ips.role: Owns the LIN protocol engine and timing behavior.

reusable_ips.name: LIN Transceiver
reusable_ips.description: Mixed-signal LIN physical interface with driver and receiver paths.
reusable_ips.role: Bridges digital control signals to the automotive LIN bus and back.

reusable_ips.name: Low-Pass Filter
reusable_ips.description: RC low-pass filter for noise rejection and anti-aliasing.
reusable_ips.role: Attenuates high-frequency noise before ADC input or sensitive analog nodes.

reusable_ips.name: LVDS Driver
reusable_ips.description: Low-voltage differential signaling driver for noise-immune high-speed interfaces.
reusable_ips.role: Drives differential signals for low-noise communication across chip boundaries.

reusable_ips.name: LVDS Receiver
reusable_ips.description: Low-voltage differential signaling receiver for noise-immune high-speed interfaces.
reusable_ips.role: Receives and recovers differential signals for low-noise communication across chip boundaries and backplanes.

reusable_ips.name: Memory Compiler
reusable_ips.description: Embedded SRAM macro for configuration and data storage.
reusable_ips.role: Provides local storage for register settings, calibration, and runtime state.

reusable_ips.name: NFC/RFID Controller
reusable_ips.description: NFC Type 2/3 and ISO14443-A compliant RFID/NFC controller for proximity and short-range communication.
reusable_ips.role: Enables wireless identification, authentication, and contactless data exchange for payment, access control, and asset tracking.

reusable_ips.name: Operational Amplifier
reusable_ips.description: Reusable operational amplifier macro for instrumentation and filtering.
reusable_ips.role: Provides high-gain analog signal processing for sensor conditioning.

reusable_ips.name: Phase-Locked Loop
reusable_ips.description: Phase-locked loop for clock multiplication and jitter reduction.
reusable_ips.role: Multiplies reference clock to higher frequencies with reduced jitter.

reusable_ips.name: Precision Voltage Reference
reusable_ips.description: High-accuracy voltage reference for data converters and comparators.
reusable_ips.role: Provides calibrated reference voltage for precision analog circuits.

reusable_ips.name: PROFIBUS Transceiver
reusable_ips.description: PROFIBUS PA/DP physical layer transceiver for industrial fieldbus communication.
reusable_ips.role: Bridges digital PROFIBUS protocol signals to industrial PROFIBUS fieldbus for distributed process control.

reusable_ips.name: Programmable Gain Amplifier
reusable_ips.description: Instrumentation amplifier with programmable gain for flexible sensor signal conditioning.
reusable_ips.role: Amplifies small sensor signals with software-selectable gain and high CMRR.

reusable_ips.name: PWM Generator Controller
reusable_ips.description: Programmable PWM generator with complementary output support for motor and converter drive.
reusable_ips.role: Generates synchronized PWM signals for power electronics control with adjustable frequency and dead-time.

reusable_ips.name: Qi Wireless Power Receiver
reusable_ips.description: Wireless power receiver controller for Qi standard charging (5W-15W) with foreign object detection.
reusable_ips.role: Enables wireless charging capability for portable IoT devices with automated power negotiation and safety.

reusable_ips.name: Register File
reusable_ips.description: Central register bank for configuration, status, and trim control.
reusable_ips.role: Holds chip configuration state and status visibility.

reusable_ips.name: Reset Generator
reusable_ips.description: Power-on reset and watchdog reset sequencer with debouncing.
reusable_ips.role: Generates robust reset signals synchronized to power-up and watchdog events.

reusable_ips.name: RF Front-End Module
reusable_ips.description: Integrated low-noise amplifier (LNA) and power amplifier (PA) front-end for multi-band RF systems.
reusable_ips.role: Provides high-gain, low-noise reception and high-power transmission for cellular, WLAN, and satellite IoT.

reusable_ips.name: Ring Oscillator
reusable_ips.description: On-chip ring oscillator for internal clock generation.
reusable_ips.role: Generates primary system clock using delay chain oscillation for standalone operation.

reusable_ips.name: RS-485 Transceiver
reusable_ips.description: Isolated or non-isolated RS-485 bus transceiver for long-distance serial communication.
reusable_ips.role: Bridges digital UART signals to industrial RS-485 bus with integrated line termination options.

reusable_ips.name: Sample and Hold Frontend
reusable_ips.description: Reusable sample-and-hold front-end stage for ADC assembly.
reusable_ips.role: Captures the analog input and holds it stable for conversion.

reusable_ips.name: SAR ADC Top
reusable_ips.description: Top-level successive-approximation ADC reference implementation.
reusable_ips.role: Provides a reusable sampled-data converter macro for sensor or monitor chips.

verification.description: Top-level transient snapshot for the imported SAR ADC reference design.

checks.description: Internal SAR conversion nodes are present

reusable_ips.name: SHA Hash Accelerator
reusable_ips.description: Hardware SHA-256/512 hash computation accelerator for integrity verification and authentication.
reusable_ips.role: Accelerates cryptographic hashing for secure boot, firmware verification, and authentication protocols.

reusable_ips.name: Sigma-Delta ADC Top
reusable_ips.description: Top-level sigma-delta ADC reference implementation.
reusable_ips.role: Provides an oversampled converter macro for sensing and monitoring chips.

verification.description: Top-level transient snapshot for the imported Sigma-Delta ADC reference design.

reusable_ips.name: Slew-Rate Limited Output Buffer
reusable_ips.description: Output buffer with programmable slew-rate limiting for EMI reduction.
reusable_ips.role: Limits dI/dt and dV/dt on outputs to reduce radiated and conducted emissions.

reusable_ips.name: SPI Controller
reusable_ips.description: Register access path for software-programmable mixed-signal chips.
reusable_ips.role: Provides serial register access into the chip control plane.

reusable_ips.name: Temperature Sensor
reusable_ips.description: On-die temperature sensor for thermal monitoring and protection.
reusable_ips.role: Provides die temperature feedback for power sequencing and thermal shutdown.

reusable_ips.name: Trim Circuit
reusable_ips.description: Programmable resistor ladder for analog parameter tuning.
reusable_ips.role: Provides post-silicon trimming capability for reference, bias, and threshold tuning.

reusable_ips.name: True Random Number Generator
reusable_ips.description: Entropy-based true random number generator for cryptographic key generation and nonce production.
reusable_ips.role: Provides non-predictable random numbers for cryptographic operations, ensuring security of random key generation.

reusable_ips.name: UART Controller
reusable_ips.description: UART/serial interface for host communication.
reusable_ips.role: Provides serial debug and data port to external host or console.

reusable_ips.name: Ultra-Wideband Transceiver
reusable_ips.description: Ultra-wideband RF transceiver for high-precision ranging and localization (IEEE 802.15.4z).
reusable_ips.role: Enables indoor positioning, asset localization, and secure communication for industrial IoT and consumer devices.

reusable_ips.name: Voltage Ladder DAC
reusable_ips.description: String DAC for programmable reference and bias generation.
reusable_ips.role: Converts digital codes into precision analog voltage levels via resistor divider.

reusable_ips.name: Watchdog Timer
reusable_ips.description: System watchdog for fault detection and recovery.
reusable_ips.role: Monitors system health and forces reset on timeout for robustness.

verification_ips.name: Current Consumption VIP

verification_ips.name: High-Speed Signal VIP

verification_ips.name: I2C Verification IP
verification_ips.description: Validates I2C master/slave protocol compliance and timing.

verification_ips.name: I2S Audio VIP
verification_ips.description: Validates I2S protocol timing, frame boundaries, and stereo channel integrity.

verification_ips.name: I3C Verification IP
verification_ips.description: Validates I3C controller compliance with MIPI I3C specification including backward I2C compatibility.

verification_ips.name: I/O Electrical Characteristics VIP
verification_ips.description: Measures I/O electrical specifications including drive capability and threshold margins.

verification_ips.name: LIN Verification IP

verification_ips.name: Mixed-Signal Bridge VIP

verification_ips.name: NFC Verification IP

verification_ips.name: Noise Performance VIP
verification_ips.description: Evaluates converter noise performance including SNR, THD, and spectral characteristics.

verification_ips.name: Power Domain Isolation VIP

verification_ips.name: Power Sequence VIP

verification_ips.name: Power Supply VIP
verification_ips.description: Measures power supply quality metrics including ripple, PSRR, and regulation performance.

verification_ips.name: Precision DAC VIP

verification_ips.name: PROFIBUS VIP

verification_ips.name: SPI Verification IP

verification_ips.name: Temperature Corner VIP

verification_ips.name: Voltage Regulation VIP

chip_profiles.name: Analog Signal Conditioner
chip_profiles.summary: Mixed-signal front-end combining precision references, filters, multiplexers, and ADCs.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable analog front-end macro for precision measurement and signal conditioning.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles precision analog infrastructure—references, op-amps, filters, multiplexers, and ADCs—for sensor signal conditioning in measurement and industrial applications.

chip_profiles.name: Audio Codec ASIC
chip_profiles.summary: Digital audio interface chip combining stereo ADC/DAC, I2S, and signal conditioning.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated audio codec platform with I2S interface and precision analog front-end.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete audio-in/audio-out codec chip from precision analog infrastructure (references, op-amps, filters, ADC/DAC) and digital I2S interface for consumer and automotive audio applications.

chip_profiles.name: Automotive HV/DC PMIC
chip_profiles.summary: Automotive multi-output PMIC with boost converter, buck converter, and integrated protection.
chip_profiles.headline: High-integration automotive power management IC for battery-powered systems with multiple rail generation.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines boost, buck, and LDO converters with multi-rail sequencing, frequency monitoring, and thermal protection for demanding automotive power-distribution applications.
chip_profiles.standard: ISO 26262 ASIL-B, ISO 7637 transient immunity, AEC-Q200

chip_profiles.name: Automotive Infotainment SoC
chip_profiles.summary: Advanced in-vehicle infotainment system with multi-protocol connectivity, audio interface, and safety monitoring.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated automotive SoC for multimedia and telematics with safety-critical features.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile creates a complete automotive infotainment chip combining I2S audio interfaces, multi-protocol connectivity (CAN, Ethernet), safety monitoring, and robust power management for in-vehicle entertainment and navigation systems.

chip_profiles.name: CAN Automotive Node
chip_profiles.summary: CAN-enabled automotive controller with transceiver, messaging, and thermal protection.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated CAN node assembly with automotive-grade reliability and multi-protocol support.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines CAN transceiver and controller with thermal monitoring, watchdog, and multi-channel analog monitoring for robust automotive embedded applications.

chip_profiles.name: Debug Console Interface
chip_profiles.summary: UART-based debug and telemetry interface with register access and event logging.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable debug interface combining UART, SPI, and control plane for system diagnostics.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile provides a minimal but functional debug and telemetry framework combining serial and parallel register-access methods for lab characterization and field diagnostics.

chip_profiles.name: Ethernet Sensor Hub
chip_profiles.summary: Networked sensor aggregation node with Ethernet PHY, multi-channel I2C/SPI, and precision analog.
chip_profiles.headline: Industrial sensor hub with Ethernet connectivity for distributed measurement systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete sensor aggregation and networking device combining Ethernet connectivity, multi-protocol sensor interfaces (I2C, SPI), precision analog front-ends, and data buffering for industrial process monitoring and control.

chip_profiles.name: High-Voltage Power Supply
chip_profiles.summary: Automotive high-voltage supply combining buck converter, LDO, charge pump, and protection.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable high-voltage PMIC assembly for automotive battery-powered systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile starts a high-voltage PMIC from buck, charge pump, and multi-rail LDO infrastructure for automotive battery-connected applications with integrated power sequencing.
chip_profiles.standard: ISO 7637 transient immunity, internal PMIC spec

chip_profiles.name: Industrial IoT Gateway
chip_profiles.summary: Multi-protocol industrial gateway with PROFIBUS, CANopen, Ethernet, and security acceleration.
chip_profiles.headline: Comprehensive industrial edge node for protocol translation and secure data aggregation.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete industrial IoT gateway from multiple protocol interfaces (PROFIBUS, CANopen, Ethernet), cryptographic security acceleration, and robust power management for distributed industrial control and data collection.

chip_profiles.name: IoT Edge Hub
chip_profiles.summary: Multi-protocol IoT edge node combining BLE, NFC, security, and sensor aggregation.
chip_profiles.headline: Advanced IoT gateway with wireless connectivity, cryptographic security, and sensor hub integration.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete IoT edge hub from wireless transceivers (BLE, NFC, RF front-end), cryptographic accelerators, sensor interfaces, and battery management for battery-powered edge AI and data collection.
chip_profiles.standard: BLE 5.0, MIPI I3C, ISO 26262 ASIL-B capable, Qi-enabled

chip_profiles.name: Isolated Power Supply Controller
chip_profiles.summary: Isolated PMIC with multiple isolated rails, boost/buck converters, and high-side gate drivers.
chip_profiles.headline: Industrial-grade multi-isolated power management IC for modular and resilient systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile creates a comprehensive isolated power controller combining multiple LDO rails with galvanic isolation, boost/buck conversion, high-side gate drivers, and power sequencing for industrial equipment requiring multiple isolated supplies.

chip_profiles.name: Isolated RS-485 Gateway
chip_profiles.summary: Galvanically isolated RS-485 interface combining transceiver, isolation, and protocol handling.
chip_profiles.headline: Isolated industrial communication gateway for multi-node networks and power-isolated systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines RS-485 transceiver with integrated isolation barrier and protocol handling for robust industrial communication networks with ground potential differences.

chip_profiles.name: LIN Node ASIC
chip_profiles.summary: Automotive LIN node with integrated analog rails, transceiver, and digital control plane.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated LIN chip assembly from reusable power, interface, and digital IP.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines the reusable bandgap, regulator, LIN interface, and control-plane IP blocks into an automotive-oriented mixed-signal chip scaffold.

chip_profiles.name: Mixed-Signal Sensor Hub
chip_profiles.summary: Sensor/control chip scaffold combining references, rails, multiple converter macros, and shared digital control.
chip_profiles.headline: Sensor-hub chip assembly from reusable analog, converter, and digital subsystem IP.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines power/reference infrastructure with multiple converter macros and a shared digital control plane so new monitor or sensor chips start from integrated building blocks instead of a blank architecture.
chip_profiles.standard: Internal sensor and monitor architecture reference

chip_profiles.name: Multi-Sensor Hub
chip_profiles.summary: I2C-based sensor aggregation platform with dual data converters and temperature monitoring.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable multi-sensor platform combining I2C interface, analog monitoring, and temperature protection.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile builds a sensor aggregation chip from reusable I2C controller, dual ADC macros, thermal monitoring, and analog signal conditioning IPs.

chip_profiles.name: Power Management Unit
chip_profiles.summary: PMU-oriented chip scaffold combining references, regulators, switching conversion, and control-plane logic.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable PMU chip assembly with analog power IP and digital control integration.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile starts a power-management chip from reusable bandgap, regulator, switching, and digital-control assets already in the repository.

chip_profiles.name: Precision Analog Front-End
chip_profiles.summary: Lab instrumentation front-end with programmable gain, multi-threshold detection, and precision references.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable precision analog interface for measurement equipment and laboratory instrumentation.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile builds a precision analog front-end from programmable gain amplifiers, multi-threshold comparator arrays, and precision reference generators for multi-channel instrumentation.

chip_profiles.name: Real-Time Motor Controller
chip_profiles.summary: Three-phase motor control ASIC with PWM generation, current sensing, and thermal protection.
chip_profiles.headline: Integrated motor control platform for robotics, industrial drives, and automotive applications.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete motor controller from PWM generation, programmable gain amplifiers for current sensing, thermal monitoring, and digital control plane for commutation sequencing.
chip_profiles.standard: IEC 61800-5 suitability, internal motor-control architecture reference

chip_profiles.name: Safe Motor Drive Controller
chip_profiles.summary: Functional safety-compliant three-phase motor drive with integrated diagnostics and SIL monitoring.
chip_profiles.headline: ISO 13849 SIL-2 capable motor drive ASIC for safety-critical industrial applications.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile creates a safety-critical motor control IC combining three-phase PWM generation, current sensing, thermal protection, watchdog monitoring, and built-in safety diagnostics for industrial robots, conveyors, and machinery requiring certified safety performance.

chip_profiles.name: SAR ADC Macro
chip_profiles.summary: Converter-oriented chip scaffold centered on a reusable SAR ADC macro and digital control hooks.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable SAR ADC chip assembly with verification hooks baked in.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile packages the available SAR ADC macro and supporting control/VIP pieces into a reusable converter design scaffold.

chip_profiles.name: Secure IoT Gateway
chip_profiles.summary: Enterprise-grade IoT gateway with integrated crypto, multi-protocol wireless, and secure boot.
chip_profiles.headline: Production-ready secure IoT gateway for connected industrial and enterprise systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile combines multi-protocol wireless connectivity, strong cryptographic protection, secure boot infrastructure, and robust power management for enterprise IoT deployments requiring FIPS 140-2 level compliance.
chip_profiles.standard: BLE 5.0, MIPI I3C, AES-256, SHA-512, FIPS 140-2 Level 2

chip_profiles.name: Sigma-Delta ADC Macro
chip_profiles.summary: Oversampled converter scaffold centered on a reusable sigma-delta ADC macro and its control plane.
chip_profiles.headline: Reusable sigma-delta converter chip assembly with integrated validation flow.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile packages the available sigma-delta ADC macro and the reusable digital control path for monitoring and sensing designs.

chip_profiles.name: Smart Battery Pack Controller
chip_profiles.summary: Multi-cell battery management system with wireless telemetry and active balancing.
chip_profiles.headline: Intelligent battery pack controller for electric vehicles and portable power systems.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile assembles a complete battery management system from multi-cell voltage/current monitoring, active balancing, thermal management, wireless telemetry, and pack-level protection for automotive and industrial energy storage.

chip_profiles.name: Wireless-Powered Sensor Node
chip_profiles.summary: Battery-free or battery-assisted sensor node with Qi wireless charging and energy harvesting.
chip_profiles.headline: Sustainable IoT sensor node with wireless power and storage management.
chip_profiles.narrative: This profile creates a low-power or battery-free sensor node combining wireless power receivers (Qi standard), energy harvesting, battery management, sensor interfaces, and wireless transmission for maintenance-free IoT deployments.
chip_profiles.standard: Qi Wireless Charging, ISO/IEC 63000 (consumer electronics environmental profiles)
